basics.name: Priyanka Mohapatra
basics.label: Human Resource Executive
basics.summary: To work for an organization that provides me the opportunity to improve my skills, academic knowledge, and knowledge with the organization's objective

location.address: B903, Marquise by Sparkle Realty, Bannerghatta Road

education.studyType: PG diploma in Banking and Insurance Management (Regular Mode).

work.name: Mythical Phoenix Private Limited
highlights: Understanding manpower requisition from the concerned department.
Understanding the requirement and accordingly drafting a job description and getting it approved by the concerned person.
Responsible for the entire recruitment cycle right from searching/ sourcing and screening resumes to coordinating and conducting interviews.
Advertise Job posting on various social media and job posting sites like Naukri, LinkedIn, Glassdoor, indeed, etc.
Screening incoming resumes and applicants' forms
Conducting pre-screening interviews and shortlisting candidates for the final round.
Arranging for technical interviews and coordinating with the concerned person.
Scheduling interviews between technical head and candidate personal, telephonic & video call interviews.
Coordination and follow-ups with candidates in the process.
Follow up with various employees to ensure work.
Developing recruitment planning.
Doing a background verification of the shortlisted candidates.
Coordinated work activities for HR managers, specialists, and recruiting agents.
Directed hiring and onboarding programs for new employees.
Educate employees on the company policy and kept employee handbook current.

work.name: TECH MAHINDRA
highlights: Resolve customers' service or billing complaints.
Contact customers to respond to inquiries or to notify them of claim investigation results or any planned adjustments.
Refer unresolved customer grievances to designated departments for further investigation.
Confer with customers by telephone or in-person to provide information about products or services, take or enter orders, cancel accounts, or obtain details of complaints

work.name: Bookingjini
highlights: Keep records of customer interactions or transactions, recording details of inquiries, complaints, or comments, as well as actions.
Check to ensure that appropriate changes were made to resolve customers' problems
Determine charges for services requested, collect deposits or payments, or arrange for billing
Resolve customers' service or billing complaints by performing activities such as exchanging merchandise, refunding money, or adjusting bills
